design_philosophy: Authoritative, clean, and highly functional. The design emphasizes trust and rapid conversion for a local home service business. Bold true-blue accents evoke cleanliness and reliability, while high-contrast yellow/orange CTAs drive immediate action (calling or booking).

layout_and_spacing.surface_style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200

hero.layout: Grid 1 md:2 columns. Left: Text & CTAs. Right: Image.

services_bento.card_style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, hover:-translate-y-1, image at top, text below with generous p-6 padding.

booking_form.style: Shadcn form components. High contrast input fields. Clean layout. Use background abstract image softly blended.

payment_section.layout: Card centered or side-by-side with instructions.
payment_section.qr_code: Display the provided QR clearly with a border and scanning instructions.

floating_whatsapp.style: bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-transform

footer.layout: Grid layout for Address, Contact, Links

animations.scroll_reveal: Framer motion whileInView fade and slight translate-y.
animations.hover_states: Buttons scale 1.02, cards elevate with shadow.

icons.usage: Use for service features, phone icons, checkmarks, WhatsApp.

hero_technician.description: Technician fixing a modern white washing machine.

service_amc.description: Technician hands holding a wrench near a modern washing machine.

water_abstract_bg.description: Abstract water ripples and pure white.
water_abstract_bg.usage: Background for booking section or testimonials to add texture

content_data.whatsapp_message: Hello WashCare Pro, I need help with my washing machine.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the landing page with mobile-first responsive design.
Use Shadcn UI for buttons, inputs, form, and cards.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Build a floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom right.
In the Payment section, prominently display the provided QR code alongside simple instructions.
Create a clean booking form with Name, Phone, Service Dropdown, and Message.
